tests.test_name: All download formats produce valid output
tests.description: Verifies that a completed analysis can be downloaded in Markdown, HTML, and JSON formats, each producing a valid and correctly structured file.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A .md file is downloaded and contains expected Markdown heading syntax
A .html file is downloaded and contains valid opening and closing HTML tags
A .json file is downloaded with the framework set to 'bdd' in the metadata
The JSON file contains at least one test entry

tests.test_name: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
tests.description: Verifies that when an analysis is run with the Gap Analysis add-on enabled, the downloaded JSON file includes the gap analysis section.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON file contains a top-level 'gap_analysis' key when Gap Analysis was selected as an add-on
